narrative:
Precinct Athalia (precinct in Lawrence County) has 165 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
